headline: Merck Gardasil Settlement Eases Legal Overhang And Refocuses Investor Attention
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) has agreed to a settlement worth more than $50m to resolve over 200 lawsuits related to its Gardasil HPV vaccine. The settlement concludes a significant block of litigation while Merck continues to state that Gardasil is safe and effective. This development comes as Merck's share price stands at $120.26 and the stock has returned 60.6% over the past year. For investors watching Merck, the Gardasil settlement is a material legal event that helps clear a long running source...

headline: Gilead, Merck, Eli Lilly Lead $106B Biopharma Takeover Wave In 2026
summary: Biopharma M&A has surged to $106 billion across 201 deals through early June 2026, putting the sector on track for its strongest full-year total since the 2019 pre-pandemic peak, CNBC reported.
